V-M-005.checks: Referral logic remains excluded from manual internal clients issuance, and Phase-28 referral linkage is delayed until the referred user verifies email ownership.
V-M-005.commands: cd backend && SECRET_KEY=test-secret-key-with-enough-length DATA_ENCRYPTION_KEY=dpFmfSVqfdAK3yx5MQV6Tcv35RZuw5MzaH0yhxJ01q0= PYTHONPATH=. ../.venv/bin/python -m pytest -o addopts='' tests/test_verified_registration.py tests/test_referrals.py -v

phase-28-referral-gates.gate-1: Pending email registration with referral code cannot create referral linkage, referral stats, or bonus-eligible side effects.
phase-28-referral-gates.gate-2: Verified activation links the referred user exactly once when the referral code is valid and not self-referral.
phase-28-referral-gates.gate-3: Verify token replay cannot duplicate referral linkage or bonus eligibility.
phase-28-referral-gates.gate-4: Existing referral code uniqueness, self-referral rejection, first-payment bonus, and stats aggregation remain green.

scenarios.scenario-1: Unique referral code created for user.
scenarios.scenario-2: Verified referred user linked to referrer once.
scenarios.scenario-4: Unverified registration does not link referral effects.

V-M-005.evidence: 2026-05-13: Phase-28 backend suite passed locally and proved pending registration creates no referral linkage while verified activation links the referral once.

phase-69-verification-design.scope: Referral domain verification for paid-referral bonus correctness.
phase-69-verification-design.gate-1: Paid referred user must trigger exactly one 7-day bonus for the inviter after the payment is confirmed.
phase-69-verification-design.gate-2: Referrer with active subscription must receive an extension of the current subscription window.
phase-69-verification-design.gate-3: Referrer without active subscription must receive a pending 7-day entitlement that starts on the referrer's first VPN connection.
phase-69-verification-design.gate-4: Repeated webhook/payment processing must not duplicate bonus days or referral stats.
phase-69-verification-design.gate-5: Referral history must expose masked referred identity only, never full email or hidden backend identifiers.
phase-69-verification-design.commands: cd backend && pytest tests/test_referrals.py tests/test_trial_activation.py tests/test_billing_service.py; node scripts/phase69-referral-bonus-smoke.mjs
phase-69-verification-design.redaction: Tests and logs must redact full emails, payment IDs, bearer tokens, and referral codes unless using synthetic fixtures.

V-M-005.phase-69-evidence: 2026-06-04: tests/test_referrals.py passed for active +7 day extension, pending first-VPN referral bonus grant, duplicate webhook idempotency, minimum amount rejection, and masked referred identity; scripts/phase69-referral-bonus-smoke.mjs passed.
